title: crataegus sanguinea var. altaica
intro: Crataegus sanguinea var. altaica, also known as the Siberian hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Crataegus sanguinea var. altaica include lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and improving overall cardiovascular function. The herbal preparations of this plant typically include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and prevent cardiovascular disease.
